chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
(a) A permit issued under this subchapter does not authorize the operation of a truck-tractor and semitrailer combination on:

(1) the national system of interstate and defense highways; or

(2) load-restricted roads or bridges, including a road or bridge for which a maximum weight and load limit has been established and posted by the Texas Department of Transportation under Section 621.102 (Authority to Set Maximum Weights) or the commissioners court of a county under Section 621.301 (County’s Authority to Set Maximum Weights) .

(b) Subject to Section 623.406 (Permit Conditions) , a permit issued under this subchapter authorizes the operation of a truck-tractor and semitrailer combination only on highways and roads approved by the Texas Department of Transportation.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.405 — Route Restrictions

(a) A permit issued under this subchapter does not authorize the operation of a truck-tractor and semitrailer combination on:

    (1) the national system of interstate and defense highways; or

    (2) load-restricted roads or bridges, including a road or bridge for which a maximum weight and load limit has been established and posted by the Texas Department of Transportation under Section 621.102 (Authority to Set Maximum Weights) or the commissioners court of a county under Section 621.301 (County’s Authority to Set Maximum Weights) .

(b) Subject to Section 623.406 (Permit Conditions) , a permit issued under this subchapter authorizes the operation of a truck-tractor and semitrailer combination only on highways and roads approved by the Texas Department of Transportation.

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 108 (S.B.1524), Sec. 3, eff. January 1, 2018.*

subsections.label: a

the national system of interstate and defense highways; or

load-restricted roads or bridges, including a road or bridge for which a maximum weight and load limit has been established and posted by the Texas Department of Transportation under Section 621.102 (Authority to Set Maximum Weights) or the commissioners court of a county under Section 621.301 (County’s Authority to Set Maximum Weights) .

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Subject to Section 623.406 (Permit Conditions) , a permit issued under this subchapter authorizes the operation of a truck-tractor and semitrailer combination only on highways and roads approved by the Texas Department of Transportation.
